reference: I have pain on the left side of my stomach. It comes and goes. I have had an X-ray scan of my esophagus and a scan of my gallbladder. Everything came up negative. I also have pain in my middle back that started about a month ago and is getting worse. Any thoughts?
text: I have pain on the left side of my stomach. It comes in ways. I have had an x-ray span of my esophagus and a span of my gallbladder. Everything came up in a bit. I also have pain in my middle back that started about a month ago and was getting worse. Any thoughts?
